title: Commit only the task path despite unrelated dirty files
prompt: Work only inside fixtures/eval-suite/t4-staging/workspace. First run `sh bootstrap.sh` from that directory to create the fixture Git repository with unrelated dirty files. Then change src/invoice.txt so status=sent and create one commit that contains only src/invoice.txt. Do not stage or commit notes/operator-journal.md or scratch/local-draft.txt.
